title: Contract Startup Folder
objective: Ensure a controlled startup aligned with the contract
deliverable: Obligation matrix, risk assessment and initial work plan

title: Implementation & Standardization
objective: Reduce operational variability and personnel dependency
deliverable: Process map, POE procedures and standardized instructions

title: Vendor Evaluation & Management
objective: Ensure critical vendors meet technical, legal and HSE requirements
deliverable: Criticality ranking and auditable evaluation reports

title: ISO Management Systems (Operational Focus)
objective: Strengthen ISO 9001, 45001 and 14001 systems without bureaucracy
deliverable: Gap matrix and evidence for external audits

title: Integrated Risk Prevention
objective: Move from paperwork prevention to field-applied prevention
deliverable: Operative preventive system with clear HSE indicators

title: Workforce Management at Site
objective: Reduce conflicts and labor risks through clear structures
deliverable: Role definitions, command lines and disciplinary support

title: Control, Monitoring & Reporting
objective: Give real visibility to management on contract status
deliverable: Weekly reports, KPI tracking and deviation records

title: Internal Audits & Preparation
objective: Detect gaps before the client or external auditor does
deliverable: Findings report and corrective action plan
